title: HLS Automotive Envy - Bumper & Trim Gel 5L
features: Envy is an easy to use gel that will rejuvenate plastics and rubber as well as impart a long lasting shine.
Envy’s unique silicone based formulation will impart a lustrous sheen to internal and external plastic and rubber.
Envy is a highly versatile product and can be used to improve the appearance of almost all plastics, rubber and vinyl surfaces.
Do not use Envy on steering wheels, pedals, gear sticks and footplates as they will become very slippy.
description: Product Description Envy -Bumper & Trim Gel Premium Silicone Dressing 5L (HLS Automotive) Envy is an easy to use gel that will rejuvenate plastics and rubber as well as impart a long lasting shine . Envy’s unique silicone based formulation will impart a lustrous sheen to internal and external plastic and rubber. Use to improve the appearance of: ○ Bumpers ○ Tyres ○ Interior Trim ○ Dash Boards ○ Centre Consoles ○ Engine Bay Plastics Leaves a black glossy finish Highly Effective Formulation HLS Automotive Envy - Bumper & Trim Gel is a unique formulation which has been tried and tested by professionals and enthusiasts alike. HLS Automotive Envy - Bumper & Trim Gel is safe to use on: External front and rear bumpers Internal black trim that look faded or tired. Skirts & Side Mirror Trims Premium Silicone Dressing Long Lasting Bumper & Trim Gel Make no mistake, this is one of the most effective bumper & trim gels available on the market! If you are looking rejuvenate your interior trims or give your bumpers a new lease of life, then this is the product to buy! Envy requires far less effort than most bumper & trim gels for: Reviving the look of old, tired front & rear bumpers bringing life back to your tired looking dashboard. removing tobacco and vape residues Usage instructions For best results use a clean microfibre cloth. 1. Apply to surface using a clean microfibre cloth. 2. Gently work in the bumper & trim gel in circular motions. . 3. Buff dry with a second clean microfibre cloth for best results. 4. Repeat process 1- 3 if necessary for desired look. Got any questions? We kindly ask our customers to message us through Amazon if they have any issues regarding their order before leaving any feedback. We are here to help if: You need technical help and advice. Your order was incorrect. Your delivery has not arrived. You have any questions before purchasing. Proud Sponsors of Adam Smalley - Porsche Carrera Cup GB 2022 HLS Automotive is proudly sponsoring Adam Smalley for the 3rd year in a row after his transition to the Porsche Carrera Cup GB 2022 after winning the 2021 Ginetta GT4 Supercup with style. HLS Automotive have supplied Adam and his team with all the products they need to ensure they get the best performance both on and off the track. #acleanercarisafastercar HLS Automotive Envy -Bumper & Trim Gel Premium Silicone Dressing 5L The Professional's Choice. Envy - Bumper & Trim Gel gives a long lasting - like new effect, is streak free, and simple to use.
